/usr/bin/ar qc libfinsight_core.a CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/finsight_core_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/managers/FinanceTrackerBackend.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/utils/EnvLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/services/AIService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/services/AnalyticsService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/services/AuthService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/services/BudgetAlertService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/services/BudgetService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/services/EmailService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/services/GoalService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/services/ReceiptService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/services/ReportService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/services/SavingsService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/services/SessionService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/services/ShoppingService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/core/services/TransactionService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/data/json/TextCodec.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/data/storage/BackendStore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/network/ai/ChatCompletionClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/network/email/ResendEmailClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/finsight_core.dir/src/network/client/Client.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libfinsight_core.a
